name: Rosen's Hellflame
desc: The sources of inspiration and insight utilized by Rosen on his journeys becomes clearer in some of his one-off pieces. Capable of unleashing a torrent of scorching flames at will, the Hellflame is no exception. There was a time when Rosen never left his workshop, fevered as he was by a fell drive to draw out the knowledge he had gained in its entirety, like a sinner in a confessional.
